title: BELGIUM enforcement action against Accountancy Firm (8,500)
summary: Insufficient legal basis for data processing The Belgian DPA has imposed a fine of EUR 8,500 on a accountancy firm. Following the termination of an employment contract, the controller failed to deactivate the former employee's personal work email address for a long time. Even after the former employee requested that the controller delete...
